prompt: A photorealistic magazine cover portrait of Nicholas Hoult sitting outdoors by the sea, The Times Magazine cover style. He is wearing a bright orange long-sleeve button-up shirt open over a dark patterned shirt with orange and black intricate designs, dark trousers, and a black watch. He is seated with his hands clasped together in front of him, elbows resting on his knees, looking directly at the camera with a serious, intense gaze and slightly furrowed brows. Short brown hair, light stubble. Bright natural daylight, clear blue sky and calm ocean in the background. Professional studio magazine photography style, sharp details, vibrant colors, cinematic lighting.
